info.title: ABX Service - APIs
info.description:
Create or manage actions and their versions. Execute actions and flows.

This page describes the RESTful APIs for ABX Service. The APIs facilitate CRUD operations on creation and management of Actions and their Versions and also allow Execution of Actions and Flows.

The APIs that list collections of resources  also support OData like implementation. Below query params can be used across ABX Service APIs.

Example:

1. `$orderby` - returns a result with the rows being sorted by the values of provided attribute.

    ```/abx/api/resources/actions?$orderby=name%20desc```

2. `$top`, `$skip` - `$top` returns the requested number of resources. Used with `$skip`, the client can skip a given number of resources.

    ```/abx/api/resources/actions?$expand=true&$top=10&$skip=2```

3. `page` and `$size` - page used in conjunction with `$size` helps in pagination of resources.

    ```/abx/api/resources/actions?$expand=true&page=0&$size=5```

4. `$filter` - `$filter` returns a subset of resources that satisfy the given predicate expression.

    ```
    /abx/api/resources/actions?$filter=startswith(name, 'ABC')
    /abx/api/resources/actions?$filter=toupper(name) eq 'ABCD-ACTION'
    /abx/api/resources/actions?$filter=substringof(%27bc%27,tolower(name))
    /abx/api/resources/actions?$filter=name eq 'ABCD' and actionType eq 'SCRIPT'

get.summary: Fetch an action by its ID
get.description: Retrieves an action entity with a specific ID

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID of action (required for non-system actions)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

put.description: Updates the action with the new supplied state

delete.description: Deletes an action with a specific ID

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID of action (required for non-system actions)

patch.description: Updates the state of the action based only on the supplied properties

put.description: Change the current action state to the state specified in the version

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID of action (required for non-system actions)

put.description: Marks an exisiting version of an action as released

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID of action (required for non-system actions)

delete.summary: Mark an action version as not released
delete.description: Marks an actions released version as not released

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID of action (required for non-system actions)

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID of action (required for non-system actions)

runtime.title: Runtime of the action (python, nodejs, etc...)

source.title: Source of the action as string

entrypoint.title: Name of the entry function of the action

inputs.title: Map defining the inputs of the action

additionalProperties.title: Map defining the inputs of the action

timeoutSeconds.title: Defines how long an action can run (default 600)

dependencies.title: A list of libraries to import, delimited by a comma

contentId.title: ID of the actions saved compressed content

configuration.title: Configuration of the action for specific providers

additionalProperties.title: Configuration of the action for specific providers

system.title: Flag indicating if the action is a system action.

shared.title: Flag indicating if the action can be shared across projects.

projectId.title: Project Id of the action (required for non-system actions)

Action.description: Properties of the action to patch

version.title: ID of the version to be released

ActionVersionReleaseRequest.description: ID of the version to release

projectId.title: Project Id of the action (required for non-system actions)

released.title: Flag indicating if the version is released (only 1 released version allowed per action)

contentId.title: ID of the actions saved compressed content

gitCommitId.title: Commit ID of the version if pushed to git

value.title: Value of the corresponding key - could be a string or a JSON

encrypted.title: Flag to indicate if the value should be stored and transferred encrypted or not.

ActionSecret.description: Model representing an ABX action constant input

outputs.title: Output parameters generated by the action

additionalProperties.title: Output parameters generated by the action

errorMessage.title: Error message in case the run completed with an error

triggeredBy.title: The user who triggered the action run

runtime.title: Runtime of the action run (python, nodejs, etc...)

projectId.title: Project Id of the action (required for non-system actions)

runProjectId.title: Project Id where the project will be executed (required for non-system actions)

actionVersionId.title: ID of the action version used for the execution

actionVersionName.title: Name of the action version used for the execution

configuration.title: Configuration of the action run for specific providers

additionalProperties.title: Configuration of the action run for specific providers

bundleId.title: ID of the saved bundle used for import conflict resolution

option.title: Conflict option when importing (CREATE on initial import)

projectId.title: Project ID for where to create the actions

system.title: Flag indicating if the imported actions should be system actions

projectId.title: ID of the project where the action is available (required for non-system actions)

actions.title: List of the identities of the actions to export

ActionExportRequest.description: Identities of the actions to export

projects.title: Projects in which the action occurs, delimited by a comma

hasShared.title: Flag that shows if any of the occurrences is shared

ActionCountById.description: Model representing an action, available in multiple projects

runtime.title: Runtime of the action (python, nodejs, etc...)

source.title: Source of the action as string

inputs.title: Map defining the inputs of the action

additionalProperties.title: Map defining the inputs of the action

dependencies.title: Dependencies needed for the code execution

ActionTemplate.description: Model representing an ABX action template
